title: Mega Aggron Battle Guide
summary: A pure [Steel] physical fortress with 230 Defense and [filter] — super-effective hits are reduced to 75%, making it one of the bulkiest walls in the game.
strengths: [heavy-slam] is max BP at 1425kg Mega weight
weaknesses: Speed 50 forces a slow, pivoting playstyle

recommendedMoves.reason: Hazard setter that abuses the slow speed
Secures the Mega turn and saves tempo

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Aggron drops the [Rock] typing on Mega Evolution and becomes a pure [Steel] fortress with [filter], an ability that reduces super-effective damage to 75%. With 230 base Defense, 11 resistances, and only three weaknesses, it is one of the most reliable physical walls available to non-legendary teams.

## Strengths
Pure [Steel] resists 11 types and is immune to poison status. The three remaining weaknesses — [Fire], [Fighting], and [Ground] — are softened by [filter] to 1.5x instead of 2x. 230 Defense plus HP investment lets Mega Aggron survive [earthquake] or [close-combat] from top attackers at least once. [heavy-slam] off 1425kg weight is at maximum BP against most targets.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Even at 75%, [Fire] and [Ground] hits still do meaningful damage. [close-combat] users and [heatran] are switch-out moments. Special bulk of 80 is fine for neutral hits but crumbles against [earth-power] or [fire-blast]. Speed 50 means [trick-room] or slow pivoting only.

## Recommended Moveset
[heavy-slam] is the main STAB — at 1425kg Mega weight, almost every target takes max BP. [earthquake] handles the [Fire] and [Electric] types that resist [Steel]. [stealth-rock] is the reliable hazard setter since you'll usually move second. [protect] is mandatory for the Mega turn.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[aggronite] is mandatory. [filter] activates after Mega Evolution. Tera [Steel] stacks resistances further, while Tera [Dragon] flips [Fire], [Water], [Electric], and [Grass] to resistances — a strong defensive reroute.

## Teammates & Synergy
Fits on [trick-room] cores where low speed becomes an advantage. Cover [Fighting] and [Ground] with [Psychic] and [Flying] partners. [incineroar] [intimidate] and [will-o-wisp] support extend Mega Aggron's physical longevity.

## Play Patterns
Switch in on a resisted hit, Mega evolve, [protect] if unsure, then set [stealth-rock] on a predicted switch. Use [heavy-slam] as the main pressure tool and [earthquake] into [Fire] or [Electric] walls. Tera on a telegraphed 4x [Fighting] hit to survive.
